headline: Why stocks remain resilient despite oil volatility, Hormuz risks
summary: Market Domination Host Josh Lipton is joined by Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre and Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley to further discuss why the S&P 500 (^GSPC) remains resilient despite geopolitical tensions, volatile crude oil prices (BZ=F, CL=F), and risks from a stronger US dollar and rising bond yields.

headline: What Does DRAM Memory Spending Trend Mean for Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the 15 AI stocks that are quietly making investors rich. On February 25, Morgan Stanley increased the firm’s price target on Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $254 from $244. The firm maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares, which currently yield an adjusted upside potential of more than 16%. […]

headline: Stock market correction close to its ending stages, Morgan Stanley’s Wilson says
summary: Investing.com -- The latest equity pullback appears to be nearing its later stages, according to Morgan Stanley strategist Michael Wilson, who argued that the bar “remains high for the oil spike to threaten the business/earnings cycle.”
